prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为7012→5755→7668→7289→4392，整体波动较大，2025年位次大幅前移至4392名，较2024年前移约2897名，创近五年 最佳录取位次；该校在内蒙古物理类（理科）招生计划：2021年48人、2022年48人、2023年50人、2024年50人、2025年54人、2026年56人，2026年较 2025年扩招2人（+3.7%），小幅扩招对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第38名，属全国顶尖高校 行列，近年排名稳定在36–39名区间；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合（主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议）；2025年曾发生实习安全事故（偏负面）；抖音热度排名第 82位（评价为一般），短视频平台曝光度处于中低水平，未出现明显报考热度信号；控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、冶金工程A、机械工 程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与物理类招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社 会热度为高热推荐，与东北大学优势学科高度契合；内蒙古2026年高考总人数约15.4万人，较2025年（约11.6万）增长约32%，物理类考生估算约11.1万人，竞争基数显著扩大。；东北大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，在内蒙古招生占比约1.9%（2025年67/3581），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜优势；辽宁与内蒙 古相邻，地域接受度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年物理类考生规模显著扩大（+32%）带来的竞争加剧、招生计划小幅扩招（+3.7%）的缓 解作用、以及声誉中性偏负面和抖音热度一般的综合影响，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年4392名基础上继续前移（更难进），预测最低位次约4340名，区间3840–4840 名。

- 计算机类（含软件工程、信息安全等）
- 机器人工程。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 化学类

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3840–4840名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如3800名以内）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、自动化类 等一档王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约4300名）应以机械类、数学类、材料类等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（4800名左右）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注扩招带来的录取 机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 7012 → 5755 → 7668 → 7289 → 4392, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2025, the ranking moved sharply forward to 4392, advancing approximately 2897 places compared to 2024, setting a five-year best admission ranking. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia for Physics Category (Science): 48 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 50 in 2024, 54 in 2025, and 56 in 2026. In 2026, there is a slight expansion of 2 students (+3.7%) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier national universities, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus). In 2025, there was an internship safety incident (somewhat negative). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (rated as average), indicating medium-low exposure on short video platforms, with no obvious surge in application popularity. It has 6 A- or above disciplines: Control Science and Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Software Engineering (A-), Metallurgical Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Materials Science and Engineering (A-), highlighting strong engineering capabilities highly aligned with Physics Category admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity, closely matching Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Inner Mongolia is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 111,000, significantly expanding the competition base. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, with an enrollment share in Inner Mongolia of about 1.9% (67 out of 3581 in 2025), indicating cross-provincial enrollment without local preference advantages. Liaoning is adjacent to Inner Mongolia, so regional acceptance is relatively high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of significant ranking advancement in 2025, the intensified competition due to the substantial increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026 (+32%), the mitigating effect of a slight enrollment expansion (+3.7%), and the neutral-to-negative reputation along with average Douyin popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move forward (harder to enter) from the 2025 ranking of 4392. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4340, with a range of 3840–4840.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Computer Science (including Software Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, etc.)
- Mathematics
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (including Metallurgical Engineering, etc.)
- Materials
- Energy and Power Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class
- Engineering Experimental Class (2) (including Civil Engineering, etc.)
- Chemistry
- Bioengineering
- Applied Physics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3840–4840, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 3800), prioritize aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation. If the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 4300), focus on Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical, Mathematics, and Materials. If the ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 4800), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options while also paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the enrollment expansion.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类（含原文科）最低位次分别为1041→897→1502→1191→964，整体在900–1500名区间波动，2025年基准约964名；该校在内蒙古 历史类（文科）招生计划：2021–2025年均为13人，2026年减至12人，缩招1人（-7.7%），缩招将加剧竞争。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including original Liberal Arts) were 1041 → 897 → 1502 → 1191 → 964, fluctuating within the 900–1500 range, with a baseline of approximately 964 in 2025; the enrollment plan for History Category (Liberal Arts) in Inner Mongolia was 13 students each year from 2021 to 2025, reduced to 12 in 2026, a decrease of 1 student (-7.7%), which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; in 2025, there was an internship safety incident (somewhat negative); Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (average), with no obvious signal of application heat; Northeastern University is known for engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literatures) do not directly correspond to its A- and above disciplines (Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc.), but the 985 platform still has strong appeal for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for liberal arts majors such as Public Administration and Foreign Languages and Literatures is divided or generally lukewarm; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Inner Mongolia Gaokao is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32% from 2025, with an estimated 43,000 History Category candidates, significantly expanding the competition base; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, with about 1.9% of its enrollment from Inner Mongolia, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Liaoning is adjacent to Inner Mongolia, with relatively high regional acceptance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking of 964, the significant increase in History Category candidates in 2026 (+32%) intensifying competition, the enrollment plan reduction of 1 student (-7.7%) further tightening spots, and the neutral to slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to move forward (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 889, and a range of 756–1022.

- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Ideological and Political Education, Philosophy)
- Public Administration (including Law, Public Affairs Management, Administrative Management, etc.)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 756–1022, the university has only 3 enrollment majors in History Category. It is recommended to prioritize Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class and Public Administration as main choices, with Foreign Languages and Literatures as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 800), you can aim for Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (around 1000), it is advisable to use Foreign Languages and Literatures as a safety. Note the 2026 enrollment reduction of 1 student, which will slightly increase competition.
